globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; media-src 'self' blob: https:; font-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests; block-all-mixed-content
